intro: Government and IT sectors across North America, particularly the United States, faced a concentrated wave of high-severity vulnerabilities between April 12 and April 29, 2026, with six articles tagged under KEV. The coverage highlighted four critical CVEs, including CVE-2024-57726 with a CVSS score of 9.9, alongside CVE-2024-1708 (CVSS 8.4), CVE-2024-20662, and CVE-2024-21412. Managed service providers and technology organizations were also among the primary targets, as the reporting documented four high-severity and two critical-severity incidents affecting these sectors.
